instruction: Questions 11–15: Choose A, B or C. Questions 16–20: Matching A–G.

questions.prompt: When the group meet at the airport they will have

options.label: breakfast.
coffee.
lunch.

questions.sectionInstruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.prompt: The group will be met at Munich Airport by

options.label: an employee at the National Theatre.
a theatre manager.
a tour operator.

questions.prompt: How much will they pay per night for a double room at the hotel?

options.label: 110 euros
120 euros
150 euros

questions.prompt: What type of restaurant will they go to on Tuesday evening?

options.label: an Italian restaurant
a Lebanese restaurant
a typical restaurant of the region

questions.prompt: Who will they meet on Wednesday afternoon?

options.label: an actor
a playwright
a theatre director
